ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. ICC certificate with verification code.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 2 pages. All fields legible. Contains Tetra Pak branding, buyer/consignee/ship-to blocks, line items with origin per item.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate contains reference number SEG-26D-463773 and remarks SGOTS397112, neither of which constitutes an LC reference. No field labelled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 — Postal address block: 'Tetra Pak International SA'
Invoice page 1 — VAT reg no block: 'Tetra Pak International SA'
Invoice page 2 — Postal address block: 'Tetra Pak International SA'
Invoice page 2 — VAT reg no block: 'Tetra Pak International SA'
Invoice page 2 — Signature: 'Tetra Pak International SA'

document_pairing.method: Consignor match and document content analysis
document_pairing.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Tetra Pak International SA' is expressly identified in the invoice's postal address, VAT registration blocks, and signature on both pages. The Global Id 945096440 in the invoice matches 'GID 945096440' in the certificate. Container ONEU2755281 matches. The goods descriptions match. Document pairing is confirmed.

sanity_check_8_6.criterion_1_detail: Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference. No invoice number field found in certificate.
sanity_check_8_6.criterion_2_detail: Certificate consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' found in invoice postal address block, VAT block, and signature on both pages.
sanity_check_8_6.criterion_3_detail: Certificate consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' not found in invoice. Invoice consignee is 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' However, criterion 2 is satisfied, so pairing is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA, AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, PO BOX 446, 1009 PULLY, SWITZERLAND
consignor.invoice_value: Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY (postal address); Tetra Pak International SA, Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully (VAT block)

comparison_steps.step: 4.1.0 — Koncernstruktur: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' found expressly in invoice postal address block ('Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY'), VAT registration block ('Tetra Pak International SA, Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully'), and page 2 signature. Name is an exact match after normalization of case.
Certificate states Switzerland. Invoice postal address states 'CH - 1009 PULLY' where CH is the ISO country code for Switzerland. Invoice VAT block states 'CH-1009 Pully'. Both confirm Switzerland.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur — consignor name found expressly in invoice postal address, VAT block, and signature.
Land verification via indirect identifiers — CH prefix in postal code confirms Switzerland.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA' at 'AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, PO BOX 446, 1009 PULLY, SWITZERLAND'. The invoice is issued by Tetra Pak Closures France SNC (in the 'From' field), but the invoice's postal address block, VAT registration block, and signature all expressly state 'Tetra Pak International SA' with address 'P.O. Box 446, CH-1009 Pully' and 'Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully'. Per rule 4.1.0, consignor may differ from the invoice issuer if the company name is expressly found anywhere in the invoice. The name matches exactly. The country Switzerland is confirmed via 'CH' prefix in the postal address. MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Tetra Pak International SA' found expressly in invoice postal address block and VAT registration block. Country Switzerland confirmed via CH prefix in invoice address.

consignee.certificate_value: Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company, Lo El-2, El-3, EI-4, Giao Long Industrial Zone, Phase II, Giao Long Commune, VINH LONG, Viet Nam
consignee.invoice_value: Buyer: Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co., 235 Dong Khoi Street, Saigon Ward, 700000 HO CHI MINH, VIET NAM; Consignee: Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co., same address; Ship to: HO CHI MINH CITY PORT, VIET NAM; Final destination: Vinh Long

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 — Priority 1: Check primary billing fields (Buyer, Consignee)
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice Buyer field: 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' Invoice Consignee field: 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' Certificate consignee: 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company'. These are different legal entities. 'Asia Coconut Processing' ≠ 'Tetra Pak Vietnam'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 — Priority 2: Check secondary fields (Ship to, Delivery address)
comparison_steps.detail: Ship to: 'HO CHI MINH CITY PORT'. No company name matching 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.1 — Check all identification blocks for consignee name
comparison_steps.detail: Searched entire invoice text (all pages) for 'Asia Coconut Processing'. Name not found anywhere in the invoice. Not in buyer, consignee, ship to, delivery address, header, footer, VAT block, or any other location.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.3 — Ship-To-regel: Check if certificate consignee is the Ship-To party
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' cannot be identified in the invoice's Ship-To field or any other field. The Ship-To-regel cannot apply because the certificate's consignee does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' vs 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' — completely different core names ('Asia Coconut Processing' vs 'Tetra Pak Vietnam'). These are different legal entities.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification — primary billing fields checked first.
Special rules — searched all identification blocks in invoice for consignee name.
MISMATCH — consignee not identifiable in invoice.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' in Vinh Long, Viet Nam. The invoice identifies the buyer and consignee as 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' in Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam. Ship to is 'HO CHI MINH CITY PORT'. Final destination is 'Vinh Long'. While the final destination matches the certificate consignee's city (Vinh Long), the company name 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' does not appear ANYWHERE in the invoice — not in any field, header, footer, or any text on either page. These are entirely different legal entities with different core names. Per rule 4.2.4, when the consignee cannot be identified in the invoice (company name missing from invoice), the result is MISMATCH. The country is the same (Viet Nam) but this is insufficient when the company name cannot be identified.
consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. Invoice consignee/buyer is 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' — a completely different legal entity. MISMATCH.

goods_description.certificate_value:
DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001
DreamCap26 Pro White PA001
HeliCap26 Pro White PA001
HS CODE: 392350
goods_description.invoice_value:
Item 10: DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001 (Tariff Code 39235090)
Item 20: DreamCap26 Pro White PA001 (Tariff Code 39235090)
Item 30: HeliCap26 Pro White PA001 (Tariff Code 39235090)

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.2 — Priority 1: Article numbers not present in certificate, skip to Priority 2
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (no A100001412 etc.). The text in box 6 contains product names, not article identifiers. Proceed to Priority 2.
Certificate: 'DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001'. Invoice item 10: 'DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001'. Exact match of identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning.
Certificate: 'DreamCap26 Pro White PA001'. Invoice item 20: 'DreamCap26 Pro White PA001'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'HeliCap26 Pro White PA001'. Invoice item 30: 'HeliCap26 Pro White PA001'. Exact match.
Certificate HS code: 392350. Invoice tariff codes: 39235090 for all items. Certificate code 392350 is a prefix of the invoice's full tariff code 39235090. The HS code at the 6-digit level matches.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — all three product descriptions match exactly between certificate and invoice.
MATCH — goods descriptions verified via exact text matching.

goods_description.debug_explanation: All three products in the certificate ('DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001', 'DreamCap26 Pro White PA001', 'HeliCap26 Pro White PA001') match exactly with the invoice line items. HS code 392350 in certificate corresponds to tariff code 39235090 in invoice (6-digit prefix match). MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: All three product descriptions in the certificate match exactly with corresponding invoice line items. HS code is consistent.

comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains 'GW 2899,860 KG'. This is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet. Numeric value: 2899.860, unit: KG, category: GW (Gross Weight).

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 — Förekomstkontroll: Search for numeric value in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice 'Gross weight' field states '2,899.860 KG'. After normalization of decimal/thousands separators (certificate uses comma as decimal separator: 2899,860 = 2899.860; invoice uses period as decimal separator with comma as thousands separator: 2,899.860 = 2899.860), both values are 2899.860 KG. Category GW matches Gross weight. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity identified as verifieringsgrundande: GW 2899.860 KG.
Förekomstkontroll — exact numeric value 2899.860 found in invoice Gross weight field.
Thousands separator normalization applied — comma in invoice (2,899.860) treated as thousands separator.
MATCH — numeric value and weight category verified.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'GW 2899,860 KG'. The comma in '2899,860' is a decimal separator (European notation), giving 2899.860 KG gross weight. Invoice states 'Gross weight 2,899.860 KG' where the comma is a thousands separator, giving 2899.860 KG. Both values are identical: 2899.860 KG GW. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate GW 2899.860 KG matches invoice Gross weight 2,899.860 KG exactly after normalization of thousands/decimal separators.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: FR; Origin FR (per item for all three items)

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains explicit 'Country of origin of goods: FR' field. Additionally, each item line states 'Origin FR'. FR = France (ISO alpha-2 code).
Certificate: 'FRANCE'. Invoice: 'FR'. FR is the ISO alpha-2 code for France. Per rule 4.5.4, normalization of full country name vs ISO code is permitted. FRANCE = FR. Match.
France is an EU member state. Certificate states FRANCE (specific member state). Invoice states FR. Direct country match — no EU normalization needed.

rules_applied.description: Normalization — FRANCE ↔ FR (ISO alpha-2 code). Verified as same country.
MATCH — origin country France expressly identified in invoice via 'Country of origin of goods: FR' and per-item 'Origin FR'.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'FRANCE'. Invoice 'Country of origin of goods' field states 'FR'. All three item lines also state 'Origin FR'. FR is the standard ISO alpha-2 code for France. Per rule 4.5.4, full country name and ISO code are equivalent. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'FRANCE' matches invoice 'Country of origin of goods: FR' and per-item 'Origin FR'. FR is the ISO code for France.

Country of origin of goods

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.

Document A identified as certificate (EU Certificate of Origin, ICC). Document B identified as invoice (Tetra Pak Invoice 1201776990). Pairing confirmed via consignor match, Global Id match, and container match.
Criterion 2 satisfied: consignor 'Tetra Pak International SA' found in invoice postal/VAT blocks. Pairing valid.
Consignor name found in invoice postal address, VAT block, and signature.
CH prefix in invoice address confirms Switzerland.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee priority order — primary billing fields
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice buyer and consignee are 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' Certificate consignee is 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company'. Different legal entities.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Special rules — search all identification blocks
rule_evaluation_log.detail: 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' not found anywhere in invoice text on any page.
Certificate consignee does not appear in any invoice field including Ship-To. Undantag cannot be applied.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.detail: All three products match exactly between certificate and invoice.
GW 2899.860 KG found in invoice Gross weight field.
Full country name and ISO code are equivalent.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' might be identifiable via the final destination 'Vinh Long' in the invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The final destination field only contains a city name ('Vinh Long'), not a company name. A matching city does not constitute identification of a legal entity. Per rule 4.2.4, the company name must be identifiable in the invoice. 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The consignee mismatch might be overridden because all other checkpoints match
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per the critical rule 'Förbud mot MISMATCH-override' in section 2.1, a MISMATCH on a checkpoint cannot be overridden because other checkpoints match. The consignee is a different legal entity and this constitutes a genuine MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee could be the end-customer of Tetra Pak Vietnam (a downstream buyer)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2, the system shall not make assumptions about trade relationships, agent relationships, or chain-of-supply relationships. The consignee must be expressly identifiable in the invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' i Vinh Long, Vietnam, men fakturan anger mottagaren som 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' i Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam. Företagsnamnet 'Asia Coconut Processing' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Övriga uppgifter (avsändare, varor, vikt, ursprungsland) stämmer överens.
overall_assessment.summary: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. Invoice buyer/consignee is 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' — a completely different legal entity. All other checkpoints (consignor, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are MATCH.

blocking_issues.issue: Certificate consignee 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' not found in invoice. Invoice consignee is 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.'

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport — Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: TETRA PAK INTERNATIONAL SA, AV. GENERAL GUISAN 70, PO BOX 446, 1009 PULLY, SWITZERLAND
sections.invoice_value: Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH - 1009 PULLY (postal address); Tetra Pak International SA, Av. Général-Guisan 70, CH-1009 Pully (VAT block)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) — consignor-namn uttryckligen identifierat i fakturans postadressblock och VAT-block. Land verifierat via CH-prefix i fakturans adress.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Tetra Pak International SA' med adress i Schweiz återfinns uttryckligen i fakturans postadressblock ('Tetra Pak International SA, P.O. Box 446, CH-1009 PULLY') och i VAT-blocket. Land Schweiz bekräftat via CH-prefix. Exakt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.

sections.certificate_value: Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company, Lo El-2, El-3, EI-4, Giao Long Industrial Zone, Phase II, Giao Long Commune, VINH LONG, Viet Nam
sections.invoice_value: Buyer/Consignee: Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co., 235 Dong Khoi Street, Saigon Ward, 700000 HO CHI MINH, VIET NAM
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarverifiering (4.2.4) — certifikatets mottagare kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Annat företagsnamn.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Asia Coconut Processing Joint Stock Company' i Vinh Long, Vietnam kan inte identifieras någonstans i fakturan. Fakturans buyer och consignee är 'Tetra Pak Vietnam Joint Stock Co.' i Ho Chi Minh, Vietnam — ett helt annat företag med annat namn. Företagsnamnet 'Asia Coconut Processing' förekommer inte i något fält, sidhuvud, sidfot eller annan text i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value: DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001, DreamCap26 Pro White PA001, HeliCap26 Pro White PA001, HS CODE: 392350
sections.invoice_value: Item 10: DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001, Item 20: DreamCap26 Pro White PA001, Item 30: HeliCap26 Pro White PA001, Tariff Code 39235090
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) — samtliga tre produktbeskrivningar matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Alla tre produkter i certifikatet matchar exakt med fakturans artikelrader: DreamCap26 Pro Red P1805C PA001, DreamCap26 Pro White PA001, HeliCap26 Pro White PA001. HS-kod 392350 i certifikatet motsvarar tariffkod 39235090 i fakturan (6-siffrig prefix-matchning).

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) — numeriskt värde 2899.860 identifierat i fakturans Gross weight-fält.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt GW 2899,860 KG (europeisk decimalnotation = 2899.860 KG) matchar exakt med fakturans Gross weight 2,899.860 KG (tusentalsavskiljare = 2899.860 KG). Viktkategori GW = Gross weight. Exakt matchning.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin of goods: FR; Origin FR (per article)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'FRANCE' matchar fakturans 'Country of origin of goods: FR' och per-artikel 'Origin FR'. FR är ISO alfa-2-koden för Frankrike. Normalisering av fullständigt landsnamn mot ISO-kod är tillåten.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_detail: Consignee checkpoint has status MISMATCH. At least one applicable checkpoint has MISMATCH → comparison_result = NOT_IDENTICAL. Workflow recommendation = MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. All consistent.
